_comment: Copy to ads.json (or point $BLOG_ADS_FILE at a file) to book paid placements. The renderer in blog.py stamps the mandatory 'Advertisement'/'Sponsored' label (UK ASA / CAP Code) and forces rel='sponsored nofollow noopener' on every paid link (Google paid-link policy) - nothing in this file can suppress either. Set 'active': false to pull a booking without deleting it. A slot with no matching surface/position is simply never shown.

slots.headline: Fee-free remortgage advice
slots.body: Whole-of-market brokers, no broker fee. Check your rate in two minutes.

slots.headline: This one is paused
slots.body: active:false keeps the booking on file but renders nothing.
